name: Advance America
description_short: Madison, TN Advance America at 125 Gallatin Pike N offers payday loans and title loans with fast approval.
description_long:
Advance America at 125 Gallatin Pike N in Madison, TN, is a standalone payday and title loan lender serving Madison residents. The storefront is conveniently located on Gallatin Pike North in Madison and operates Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM, with Saturday and Sunday closures.

At this Madison location, you can apply for payday loans, title loans, and other short-term lending solutions. Call +1 615-860-4665 to speak with a loan specialist about your options, answer questions about eligibility, or schedule an appointment.

Madison residents often visit Advance America when facing unexpected expenses or financial gaps between paychecks. Bring a valid ID, proof of income (pay stubs or bank statements), and your bank account information. The brand focuses on quick approval and accessible lending for borrowers with limited credit options.

pricing.guarantee_details: Worry-Free Advance policy: if the borrower loses their job while holding an active loan, Advance America will waive the loan fees. No traditional money-back guarantee — this is a lending product.

tiers.name: Payday Loans
features: In-store cash in as little as 30 minutes
Available to borrowers with bad or no credit
State-regulated fees (e.g., 15% in CA, 10% + $5 in FL)

tiers.name: Installment Loans
features: Example: $650 loan in SC, 6-month term, ~348% APR

tiers.name: Title Loans
features: Vehicle must be owned outright or have significant equity

tiers.name: Lines of Credit
features: Draw funds as needed up to credit limit
Flexible repayment compared to payday loans

pros: One of the largest payday lenders in the US with roughly 1,500–2,100 store locations across 27–28 states
Founded in 1997 — nearly 30 years of operation and a nationally recognized brand
A+ BBB rating with accreditation since 2024 and a declining complaint trend
In-store cash disbursement in as little as 30 minutes; online funding as fast as same business day
Worry-Free Advance policy waives loan fees if the borrower loses their job during repayment
Serves consumers with bad or no credit history who cannot qualify at traditional banks
Backed by Grupo Elektra, a major international retail and financial conglomerate, providing institutional stability
cons: APRs range from 143% to over 688% — far above the 36% threshold considered affordable lending by consumer advocates
BBB customer review score is just 1.7/5 from 154 reviews, despite the A+ institutional grade
Approximately 302 BBB complaints filed in the last three years, with 74 in the past 12 months alone
Only available in 27–28 states — borrowers in remaining states have no access
Short payday loan terms (7–30 days) create high rollover risk and potential debt-cycle dependency for cash-strapped borrowers
best_for: Consumers facing a genuine short-term cash emergency who need $100–$2,000 within the same day
Individuals with bad credit or no credit history who are ineligible for traditional bank loans or credit cards
Borrowers who are confident they can repay the full balance within the short loan term without rolling over
Residents of the 27–28 states where Advance America operates who prefer an established, licensed national lender over an unregulated online lender
diagnosis: Advance America is best suited for consumers who need small-dollar emergency cash immediately and have exhausted lower-cost alternatives — credit unions, family loans, employer advances, or 0% intro credit cards. The main caveat is stark: APRs routinely exceed 300–600%, making this product extremely expensive if not repaid quickly. It is a legitimate last resort, not a routine credit tool.
services: Title loans ($1,000–$10,000, secured by vehicle title via LoanCenter)
Personal loans for bad credit (online product)
In-store loan applications with same-day cash disbursement
Online loan applications with next-business-day or same-day funding
Mobile app with loan tracking and branch finder
Worry-Free Advance fee waiver for job-loss situations

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.

meta_description: Advance America at 125 Gallatin Pike N, Madison, TN. Fast payday and title loans with same-day funding.
